channel.title: ChinaTripBox Travel Guides
channel.description: Practical China travel guides for foreign visitors: payments, eSIMs, transport, apps, cities, food, and first-trip planning.

item.title: Alipay Passport Verification Problems: Why It Fails and How to Fix It
item.description: Common Alipay passport verification failures and how to fix each one: name mismatch, blurry photos, card rejection, verification timeout, and what to do if you are stuck.

item.title: Changsha City Guide for Foreigners 2026: Complete Travel Guide
item.description: Complete 2026 travel guide to Changsha for foreign visitors — top attractions, local food, getting around, best time to visit, accommodation areas, and practical tips.

item.title: China Airport Arrival Checklist 2026: What to Do the Moment You Land
item.description: Step-by-step arrival checklist for your first hour in China: customs, eSIM activation, WiFi, Alipay setup, getting a taxi or train, and common airport mistakes to avoid.

item.description: The essential apps every China traveler needs: Alipay, WeChat, DiDi, and tools that work without a VPN. A practical pre-departure checklist.

item.description: Complete 2026 guide to applying for a Chinese tourist visa — who needs one, documents required, application process, fees, processing times at Chinese visa centers worldwide, and how to avoid common rejection reasons.

item.title: China 240-Hour Visa-Free Transit 2026: Who Qualifies and How It Works
item.description: The complete 240-hour visa-free transit guide for China. Which nationalities qualify, which airports you can use, and the exact rules you need to follow.
